$comment: The project registry — a recomputable index that makes APODICTIC projects addressable (Project Addressability & State-Driven Routing, Increment 2; docs/project-addressability.md). Homed at a workspace-relative .apodictic/registry.json (NOT in the plugin repo/cache; ~ is sandbox-unsafe). Each per-project Diagnostic_State.meta.json sidecar is canonical; this registry is a denormalized cache, rebuildable by scanning the workspace root for sidecars and *_Structural_Plan_*.md artifacts. `projects` holds one apodictic.project_entry.v1 per known project. `id`/`title`/`root`/`series_root` are registry-native; `mode`/`next_action`/`last_touched` are denormalized copies of the sidecar (authoritative only there). Validated by scripts/registry_check.py (R1-R4); drift resolves to the sidecar.
title: APODICTIC project registry (apodictic.project_registry.v1)
